pi_items.verified_value: Clothing > Accessories (for most targets), Clothing > Tshirts (for Long Sleeve Tee)
pi_items.source: WooCommerce official sample data CSV (GitHub: woocommerce/woocommerce/trunk/plugins/woocommerce/sample-data/sample_products.csv); Beanie (ID 48), Cap (ID 60), Belt (ID 58), Sunglasses (ID 62) are in 'Clothing > Accessories'; Long Sleeve Tee (ID 68) is in 'Clothing > Tshirts'
Task setup_task.sh and export_result.sh confirm creation and application of 'Urgent Reorder' tag; task.json description specifies this tag name

setup_task.sh configures: Beanie=4, Cap=8, Belt=2 (all < 10 for low-stock), Sunglasses=15, Long Sleeve Tee=25 (both >= 10 for high-stock); threshold of strictly less than 10 is explicitly stated in task description

setup_task.sh sets Beanie to stock=4, Cap to stock=8, Belt to stock=2; all three are < 10 and are in Clothing > Accessories category per WooCommerce official sample data; verifier.py and export_result.sh confirm these are the expected low-stock targets

setup_task.sh sets Sunglasses to stock=15, Long Sleeve Tee to stock=25; both >= 10; verifier.py (lines 73-79) and export_result.sh confirm these are the expected high-stock targets that should NOT be tagged

privileged_info_summary: The task targets the WooCommerce Accessories product category using official WooCommerce sample data. Stock threshold is set to 10 units (strictly less than). Low-stock targets are Beanie (4 units), Cap (8 units), and Belt (2 units) - all verified to be SIMPLE products in the Clothing > Accessories category. High-stock targets are Sunglasses (15 units, also in Clothing > Accessories) and Long Sleeve Tee (25 units, in Clothing > Tshirts category - NOT in Accessories). The Urgent Reorder tag is created and should only be applied to low-stock items.
